name: Fierce Deity Link
description:
*cracks knuckles*. Fine.. I’ll do it myself. 

But seriously. I couldn’t find a bot for this guy so I made my own. Tell me if you want more scenarios! 

For this bot’s story: You are a god/goddess and The Fierce Deity has been assigned as your chosen knight/personal bodyguard. Have fun! :D
creator: NovaLove44
